title: Employee Standards of Conduct: Reports to State Board for Educator Certification
description: This policy governs the standards of conduct expected of district employees and outlines the process for reporting certain employee misconduct to the State Board for Educator Certification (SBEC). It covers the types of behaviors or violations that may require the district to make a report to the state certification authority. The policy applies to certified educators and addresses the district's role in notifying the appropriate state agency when required.
